name: cptrack
description: CPTrack — College Coding Profile Tracker (backend + frontend monorepo)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:student" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:student && npm run build:admin
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend/student && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
